title: Install Node and verify frontend build
description: Verified the frontend build after npm install was available in the environment.

title: Build accounts API
description: Implemented accounts list/detail/create/update/archive with computed balances and opening-balance transaction creation.

title: Build accounts UI
description: Implemented accounts page with add-account form, account table, current balance display, dashboard flag, and archive action.

title: Build transactions API
description: Implemented filterable transaction list, detail, create, update, void, and status update endpoints.

title: Build transfer API
description: Implemented atomic paired transfer creation with explicit inflow/outflow direction and linked partner IDs.

title: Build transactions UI
description: Implemented transactions page with manual transaction entry, transfer entry, status change, void action, and transaction table.

title: Build split transaction support
description: Implemented backend split validation and transactional split replacement for create/update; full split editor UI remains a future enhancement.

title: Build dashboard summary
description: Implemented dashboard summary endpoint and frontend dashboard cards/recent transactions driven by API data.

title: Create finance data contract project
description: Added FinanceTracker.Data.Contracts and FinanceSqlMapperDataSession so services call a professional data boundary instead of raw connection logic.

title: Move SqlMapper to in-repo reference
description: Updated backend references and SqlMapper defaults to use the in-repo server/SqlMapper project and finance_tracker connection settings.

title: Add ASP.NET identity Liquibase baseline
description: Added Liquibase create script for ASP.NET Identity user/role/claim/login/token tables and RefreshTokens, matching the reusable pipeline project baseline.

title: Add transaction direction support
description: Added Liquibase and contracts support for transaction direction so transfer balance math is unambiguous.

title: Run Liquibase against local database
description: Start local Postgres and run Liquibase update against the finance_tracker database.

title: Resolve locked Debug build outputs
description: A prior debug run left generated DLLs locked on the Windows-mounted filesystem; Release builds pass, but Debug bin cleanup should be retried after the lock clears.
